description_long: This is a cylindrical can of Chef Boyardee Mini Ravioli, featuring a vibrant red and green label with a prominent image of the Chef Boyardee mascot and a serving of ravioli in tomato and meat sauce. The front of the can displays the product name and a 'Child Hunger Ends Here' promotional badge. The top of the can is metallic with a pull-tab, while the sides are covered in detailed nutritional information, ingredients, and promotional text. The label includes images of tomatoes, onions, and ravioli, emphasizing the product's flavor and ingredients. The can is made of metal with a printed paper or plastic label, and is sealed to preserve the food inside. The overall appearance is clean, glossy, and designed to attract attention on a grocery shelf.
description: A glossy, cylindrical can of Chef Boyardee Mini Ravioli with a red and green label, brand mascot, and detailed nutritional and promotional graphics.
description_view_0: This view shows the back of the can with nutritional facts, ingredients, and a green section highlighting the product's health benefits.
description_view_1: This view displays the side of the can with a barcode, Feeding America and Child Hunger Ends Here promotional text, and part of the nutrition label.
description_view_2: This view reveals the side of the can with the Chef Boyardee logo, an image of an onion, and additional product branding.
description_view_3: This is the front view, showing the Chef Boyardee mascot, product name, a serving of ravioli, and the 'Child Hunger Ends Here' badge.
attribute_brand_logo: The Chef Boyardee logo is visible on the front, featuring a chef's face with a white hat and green background, located at the top center of the label.
attribute_flavor_indication: The label indicates 'Mini Ravioli Beef Ravioli in Tomato & Meat Sauce' with images of ravioli, tomato, and onion.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A detailed nutrition facts panel is visible on the back and side of the can, listing calories, ingredients, and other nutritional information.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A 'Child Hunger Ends Here' badge is visible on the front and side, with a red pin graphic and associated text.
